title: Invariant Testing, Fuzzing, and Reproducible Benchmarks · Trace Retrieval
summary: Audit custom structures whose happy paths pass but long random operation sequences corrupt state. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a model-based test and benchmark harness after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write executable representation invariants that fail near the corrupting operation.
Compare custom operations against a simpler trusted reference model.
Generate reproducible operation sequences and retain seeds for failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
